steps.t: Elladan is south of the Brenin's house, by the ruins of the ancient fort near Tûr Morva. Elrohir is on a small rise overlooking the lake, west of the …
Evan is just inside the entrance to Tûr Morva. You have spoken with Elladan and Elrohir concerning their knowledge of Dunlending history and should no…
Penrod is among the northern buildings of Tûr Morva. Evan has decided he is not as angry about Elves as he once was and wants you to tell Penrod.
